text:
Castlevania: Belmont’s Curse Release Date Set

The release date for Castlevania: Belmont's Curse is set, and we'll head out on a new adventure with Rose in October.

The post Castlevania: Belmont’s Curse Release Date Set appeared first on Siliconera.

text:
Persona 6 Announced

Atlus officially announced Persona 6 and offered us a first look at a PS5, Xbox Series X, and PC teaser trailer for the new JRPG.

The post Persona 6 Announced appeared first on Siliconera.

text:
Wo Long 2: Wings of Ember Appears in 2027

A first trailer appeared for the Wo Long 2: Wings of Ember sequel as part of the Sunday Summer Game Fest 2026 reveals.

text:

Atlus brought Persona 4 Revival to SGF 2026 and shared more details and a new trailer for the upcoming JRPG remake.

text:
Street Fighter Beach Queens Swimsuit Figures of Chun-Li and Cammy Coming

Good Smile Company's Beach Queens line of figures will get Street Fighter 6 Cammy and Chun-Li ones of them in the Outfit 4 swimsuit costumes.

The post Street Fighter Beach Queens Swimsuit Figures of Chun-Li and Cammy Coming appeared first on Siliconera.

text:
Atari Working on Barbie Rewind and Godzilla: Destroy All Monsters Melee Remastered Games

Both Barbie Rewind and Godzilla: Destroy All Monsters Melee Remastered are coming to modern consoles and PCs later in 2026.

The post Atari Working on Barbie Rewind and Godzilla: Destroy All Monsters Melee Remastered Games appeared first on Siliconera.

text:
Next Vampire Survivors DLC Expansion Is Legacy of the Bloodmoon

In 2026 we'll see a new Vampire Survivor DLC expansion called Legacy of the Bloodmoon with more characters, weapons, and an XL stage.

The post Next Vampire Survivors DLC Expansion Is Legacy of the Bloodmoon appeared first on Siliconera.
